ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no other enrichment

ingredients_text: Water 28.90%, Red Chilli 28%, Sugar 25%, Garlic 7%, Salt 5%, Stabilizer (Xanthan Gum) 4.40%, Thickener (Modified Corn Starch) 1%, Acidity Regulator (Acetic Acid) 0.55%, Preservative (Sodium Benzoate) 0.10%, Natural Colour (Paprika Oleoresin) 0.05%
